scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm --prefix DukaFlow-backend run dev" "npm --prefix DukaFlow-frontend run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm --prefix DukaFlow-backend run start" "npm --prefix DukaFlow-frontend run preview"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix DukaFlow-backend install && npm --prefix DukaFlow-frontend install
